headline: Microchip’s PQC Security Chips Raise Questions Around Rich Valuation
summary: Microchip Technology (NasdaqGS:MCHP) has introduced its TS1800 Platform Root of Trust and TS50x secure boot controllers. These products are described as post quantum cryptography ready and are aimed at helping customers address emerging cybersecurity mandates. The new hardware targets use cases in critical infrastructure, datacenter, telecommunication, and defense systems. For investors following NasdaqGS:MCHP, this move highlights how embedded security is becoming a core part of the...
